name: (Backend Container) Build and Push Backend Image to ACR.

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  IMAGE_NAME: legalai-backend

jobs:
  build-and-push:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: "Checkout repo"
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: "Login via Azure CLI"
        uses: azure/login@v1
        with:
          creds: ${{ secrets.AZURE_CREDENTIALS }}

      - name: "Docker login"
        uses: azure/docker-login@v1
        with:
          login-server: ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}
          username: ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Backup current latest tag
        run: |
          docker pull ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest || true
          docker tag ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:old-latest-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M)
          docker push ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:old-latest-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M) || true

      - name: "Build and push Docker image"
        run: |
          cd backend
          docker build . -t ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest
          docker push ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_LOGIN_SERVER }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }}:latest
